title: Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Manipur

overview.short: Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary (Meitei: Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Lamlak-ki Saa-Ngaa Ngaak Senpham) is an Indo-Burma wildlife sanctuary in Chandel district of Manipur.
overview.description: Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary (Meitei: Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Lamlak-ki Saa-Ngaa Ngaak Senpham) is an Indo-Burma wildlife sanctuary in Chandel district of Manipur. It is in the Indo-Myanmar border about 110 km from Imphal. It has an area of 184.80 square kilometers. The ecosystem of this wildlife sanctuary is unique and vibrant.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Imphal Airport (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (184 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Yangoupokpi-Lokchao Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shirui National Park.
